items.title: 荣耀首发预制龙虾AI智能体技术YOYO Claw
items.summary: 36氪获悉，4月13日，荣耀正式发布其自研的终端��“龙虾”AI智能体——YOYO Claw，并宣布该技术将首发搭载于荣耀MagicBook系列轻薄本中。经荣耀实验室基于PinchBench测试集验证，荣耀YOYO Claw可以实现综合词元消耗节省50%，可降低用户使用龙虾类AI的长期使用成本。

items.title_en: Honor launches pre-made lobster AI intelligent technology YOYO Claw
items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that on April 13, Honor officially released its self-developed terminal "lobster" AI intelligent agent - YOYO Claw, and announced that the technology will be installed in the Honor MagicBook series of thin and light notebooks for the first time. Verified by Honor Lab based on the PinchBench test set, Honor YOYO Claw can achieve a 50% saving in comprehensive word consumption, which can reduce the long-term cost of using lobster-like AI for users.

items.title: 智元发布面向具身作业场景的零代码应用平台Genie Studio Agent
items.summary: 36氪获悉，继连续发布数据集、仿真平台、基座模型及世界模型后，智元（AGIBOT）于“AI发布周”第五日推出面向具身作业场景的零代码应用平台——Genie Studio Agent。智元表示，从提供技术能力到构建产业基础设施，Genie Studio Agent 的发布标志着智元已完成具身智能全链路闭环。

items.title_en: Genie releases Genie Studio Agent, a zero-code application platform for embodied work scenarios
items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that following the continuous release of data sets, simulation platforms, base models and world models, AGIBOT launched a zero-code application platform for embodied work scenarios - Genie Studio Agent on the fifth day of "AI Release Week". Zhiyuan said that from providing technical capabilities to building industrial infrastructure, the release of Genie Studio Agent marks that Zhiyuan has completed the full-link closed loop of embodied intelligence.

items.title: 奇瑞已注册墨茵商标
items.summary: 36氪获悉，4月13日，查询发现，奇瑞旗下墨甲机器人的墨茵（Mornine）M1全尺寸通用具身智能机器人，已经在“AiMOGA智能机器人京东自营旗舰店”上线，该店铺具体开店时间为2026年4月2日。爱企查App显示，奇瑞汽车股份有限公司已申请注册2枚“墨茵”商标，国际分类为科学仪器、网站服务，其中网站服务类商标已注册成功。

items.title_en: Chery has registered the Mo Yin trademark
items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that on April 13, an inquiry found that Chery’s Mornine M1 full-size general-purpose embodied intelligent robot has been launched in the “AiMOGA Intelligent Robot JD Self-operated Flagship Store”. The specific opening time of the store is April 2, 2026. Aiqicha App shows that Chery Automobile Co., Ltd. has applied to register two "Mo Yin" trademarks, which are internationally classified as scientific instruments and website services. Among them, the website service trademarks have been successfully registered.
